title: Entity Type Dashboard Drilldown
description: A `dashboard_drilldown` lists the dashboards associated with an entity and its entity type.

attributes.name: id
attributes.label: id
attributes.description: A unique identifier for the dashboard.

attributes.name: base_url
attributes.label: base_url
attributes.description: An internal or external URL that points to the dashboard. This setting exists because for internal purposes, navigation suggestions are treated as dashboards. This setting is only required if `is_splunk_dashboard` is `false`.

attributes.name: is_splunk_dashboard
attributes.label: is_splunk_dashboard
attributes.description: `true` if the dashboard is a Splunk XML dashboard. If it's another dashboard type such as a JSON dashboard from the Splunk Dashboards app, or if it's a navigation link, this value is `false`.

attributes.name: dashboard_type
attributes.label: dashboard_type
attributes.description: The type of dashboard being added. This element is required. The following options are available: - `xml_dashboard` \- a Splunk XML dashboard. Any dashboards you add must be of this type. - `navigation_link` \- a navigation URL. Should be used when `base_url` is specified.

attributes.name: params
attributes.label: params
attributes.description: A set of parameters for the entity dashboard drilldown that provide a mapping of a URL parameter and its alias and static parameters.

attributes.name: create_by
attributes.label: create_by
attributes.description: The user who created this object.

attributes.name: create_source
attributes.label: create_source
attributes.description: The sourcetype initiating create. Has value `manual` for user-initiated creates. For internal use only.

attributes.name: create_time
attributes.label: create_time
attributes.description: Timestamp at the time of creation based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: mod_source
attributes.label: mod_source
attributes.description: Sourcetype initiating modification. Has value `manual` for user-initiated modifications. For internal use only.

attributes.name: mod_time
attributes.label: mod_time
attributes.description: Timestamp of the last modification based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: _user
attributes.label: _user
attributes.description: User who performed the most recent operation on this object.

attributes.name: version
attributes.label: version
attributes.description: The version of the object. Currently the same as the ITSI app version.
